title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: A 3Blue1Brown video explores how logarithmic transformations of complex numbers can be applied to images, using Escher's Print Gallery as a motivating example. The video covers conformal maps from complex analysis, the complex exponential and logarithm functions, and their geometric interpretations for image transformation.
